title: 安田記念の後に・若葉と枯れ葉

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... It's finally... over!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: (My legs... are so heavy. I'm exhausted too.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(I'm sure that's just because this was such a
difficult battle... Yeah, that must be it.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(After all, I really pushed myself here. This
might've been a G1 race, but I still did pretty...)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'm not done yet! I'm just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Next up, I'm running the spring Grand Prix: the
Takarazuka Kinen! I'll show you I can win
medium-distance races too!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Dang, she's fantastic! But is she really going to
race in another G1? Isn't she tired?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I don't feel tired at all! In fact, I feel like I'm on
fire! You all had better cheer me on!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(So that's what an Umamusume with a future
looks like...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Creak...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm back, Trainer! That race left me with a lot to
think about.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Let's see... Next, I should run...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I should...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but is it all right if I run in a different G1
race before the Japan Cup?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen is really strong, after all. I won't stand a
chance against her as I am now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I definitely need more experience, so please! May
I?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has a point—we could use one more race
before the Japan Cup in order to polish her
abilities.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ideally, it'd be best to have her run at Tokyo
Racecourse, where the Japan Cup will be held,
so...
choice_data_list: How about the autumn Tenno Sho?
How about the autumn Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's where I ran against Tamamo and Oguri last
year...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'll do it. I'll run the race and bring home the win!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll win and show everyone how much potential I
still have!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Okay...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I feel pretty good! That wasn't so bad. In fact...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Woooow! ♪ Looks like you're back in peak
condition.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, no. I was far more impressive back
during my actual peak.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Still... Hehe. You just wait. Competing with Spe
has helped me to pick up a new trick or two.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm nothing to sneeze at in my current state. I
should be able to run at full tilt.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Ooh. Has the time come at last? Will I finally be
able to witness you running at full strength?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I guess so. This might be the first time.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Since I'm past my peak, I figured my career was
going to end without me ever pulling out all the
stops...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not letting things end that way. I'm so
excited for the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm in the middle of walking Sakura Chiyono O
back to her dorm when she suddenly stops in her
tracks.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I need to ask you something. Can you
keep my condition a secret?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I did well in today's race despite everything,
right? And I should be able to do my best at the
autumn Tenno Sho too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to give people an excuse to start
gossiping. Since we don't really know what's going
on, can we keep it a secret for now?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I promise, I'm fine! So let's work hard, okay?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I was the only one dead on my
feet after today's race. The others were probably
just hiding their exhaustion...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... It can't have just been me who was tired.
I'm... I'm certain of it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...So please. Please let me keep believing I
haven't already passed my peak.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Creak... Crack!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
This uneasy sensation I keep feeling, like my
strength is crumbling away... Please just make it
all stop before the autumn Tenno Sho!
